subcodes.first_line: O thou who clingest to the Most Great Handle! Blessed are those realities that, in the gathering-place of divine manifestation, have fixed their gaze upon the vision [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بالعروه الوثقی خوشا بحال حقائقی که در محفل تجلی دیده را بمشاهده
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @stories; anecdotes
